news.title: Emil Michael, now a senior Pentagon official, says he’ll never forgive Uber investors who ousted him and Kalanick
news.summary: When asked whether he was still "salty" about about being shown the door at Uber, alongside co-founder Travis Kalanick, Michael didn't equivocate. "I'll never forget that, nor forgive," he said.

news.title: Bengaluru food delivery startup Swish raises $38M, its third round in 18 months
news.summary: Swish has more than doubled its valuation in a year as its full-stack, hyperlocal model positions ultra-fast food delivery as a high-frequency habit.

news.title: Despite bitter rivalry, Kalshi, Polymarket CEOs back $35M predictions markets VC fund
news.summary: As prediction markets explode, the new firm called 5(c) Capital, will back startups supporting the burgeoning category.

news.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
news.summary: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

news.title: Apple Maps may be about to get ads
news.summary: Apple Maps may soon serve ads in top results when users search on terms like "restaurants."

news.title: The US government just banned consumer routers made outside the US
news.summary: In December, the Federal Communications Commission banned all future drones made in foreign countries from being imported into the United States, unless or until their maker gets an exemption. news.summary: Dell XPS laptops will be the first to use the display tech that reaches up to 120 Hz.

news.title: A Billionaire-Backed Startup Wants to Grow 'Organ Sacks' to Replace Animal Testing
news.summary: R3 Bio has a bold idea for replacing lab animals: genetically-engineered whole organ systems that lack a brain. The long-term goal, says a cofounder, is to make human versions.

news.title: A Mysterious Numbers Station Is Broadcasting Through the Iran War
news.summary: First heard as US and Israeli strikes on Iran began, the shortwave broadcast has since been traced to a US military base in Germany—but its purpose and its operator remain unclear.

news.title: ICE Invades Airports Across the US
news.summary: Agents from ICE are being deployed to over a dozen airports around the country, including New York, Atlanta, and Chicago.

news.title: Polymarket’s Coming-Out Party in Washington Was a Disaster
news.summary: At the Polymarket pop-up in DC, attendees were supposed to be able to bet on geopolitical crises in real time with their friends. That didn’t happen.
